definition: A patron, a client; one who purchases or receives a product or service from a business or merchant, or intends to do so.
example: Every person who passes by is a potential customer.
exampleVi: Mỗi người đi ngang qua đều là khách hàng tiềm năng.

definition: An act of being of assistance to someone.
example: I say I did him a service by ending our relationship – now he can freely pursue his career.
exampleVi: Tôi nói rằng tôi đã giúp ích cho anh ấy bằng cách chấm dứt mối quan hệ của chúng tôi - giờ anh ấy có thể tự do theo đuổi sự nghiệp của mình.

definition: (sometimes attributive) Something which supports.
example: Don't move that beam! It's a support for the whole platform.
exampleVi: Đừng di chuyển chùm tia đó! Đó là sự hỗ trợ cho toàn bộ nền tảng.

definition: Action given to provide assistance; aid.
example: I need some help with my homework.
exampleVi: Tôi cần sự giúp đỡ với bài tập về nhà của tôi.

definition: One who exerts power, or has the power to act
example: We need to understand the concept of agent.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đại lý.

definition: A delegate.
example: We need to understand the concept of representative.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đại diện.

definition: Grief, sorrow.
example: We need to understand the concept of care.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chăm sóc.

definition: A fulfilment of a need or desire.
example: He enjoyed the dish with great satisfaction. He'll order it again the next time he arrives.
exampleVi: Anh ấy rất hài lòng khi thưởng thức món ăn. Anh ấy sẽ đặt hàng lại vào lần tới khi anh ấy đến.

definition: The act of complaining.
example: We need to understand the concept of complaint.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm phàn nàn.

definition: Critical assessment of a process or activity or of their results.
example: After you hand in your essays, I will give both grades and feedback.
exampleVi: Sau khi bạn nộp bài luận, tôi sẽ cho điểm và phản hồi.

definition: Determination; will power.
example: It took all my resolve to go through with the surgery.
exampleVi: Tôi đã phải dùng hết quyết tâm để vượt qua cuộc phẫu thuật.

definition: A difficulty that has to be resolved or dealt with.
example: She's leaving because she faced numerous problems to do with racism.
exampleVi: Cô ấy rời đi vì phải đối mặt với nhiều vấn đề liên quan đến phân biệt chủng tộc.

definition: The action or an instance of flowing or coming out, an outflow, particularly:
example: We need to understand the concept of issue.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm vấn đề.

definition: An amount of money returned.
example: If the camera is faulty, you can return it to the store where you bought it for a full refund.
exampleVi: Nếu máy ảnh bị lỗi, bạn có thể trả lại cho cửa hàng nơi bạn đã mua để được hoàn lại toàn bộ số tiền.

definition: The act of returning.
example: I expect the house to be spotless upon my return.
exampleVi: Tôi hy vọng ngôi nhà sẽ không tì vết khi tôi trở về.

definition: An act of exchanging or trading.
example: All in all, it was an even exchange.
exampleVi: Nhìn chung, đó là một cuộc trao đổi công bằng.

definition: A guarantee that a certain outcome or obligation will be fulfilled; security.
example: We need to understand the concept of warranty.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bảo hành.

definition: The act of conveying something.
example: The delivery was completed by four.
exampleVi: Việc giao hàng đã được hoàn thành bởi bốn.

definition: The transportation of goods.
example: We need to understand the concept of shipping.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm vận chuyển.

definition: A mark left by something that has passed along.
example: Can you see any tracks in the snow?
exampleVi: Bạn có thấy dấu vết nào trên tuyết không?

definition: A form containing a list of questions; a means of gathering information for a survey
example: We need to understand the concept of questionnaire.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm câu hỏi.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word evaluation.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ đánh giá.

definition: To assign or be assigned a particular rank or level.
example: She is rated fourth in the country.
exampleVi: Cô được xếp hạng thứ tư trong cả nước.

definition: A subsidiary action taken in response to an event.
example: We need to understand the concept of followup.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm theo dõi.

definition: A statement, especially one given under oath; testimony
example: We need to understand the concept of testimonial.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chứng thực.

definition: A relationship of mutual trust and respect. A close and harmonious relationship in which the people or groups concerned understand each other's feelings or ideas and communicate well.
example: He always tried to maintain a rapport with his customers.
exampleVi: Anh ấy luôn cố gắng duy trì mối quan hệ với khách hàng của mình.

definition: The situation or occurrence in which two or more objects or events act upon one another to produce a new effect; the effect resulting from such a situation or occurrence.
example: Be aware of interactions between different medications.
exampleVi: Hãy nhận biết sự tương tác giữa các loại thuốc khác nhau.

definition: A second or subsequent reading of a text or artifact in an attempt to gain new insights.
example: I need to make a review of the book before I can understand it.
exampleVi: Tôi cần phải xem lại cuốn sách trước khi tôi có thể hiểu nó.

definition: The act of assuring; a declaration tending to inspire full confidence; that which is designed to give confidence.
example: We need to understand the concept of assurance.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đảm bảo.

definition: An increase or rise, especially one to counteract a perceived discrepancy
example: We need to understand the concept of escalation.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm leo thang.

definition: The quality or state of being responsive.
example: We need to understand the concept of responsiveness.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm phản hồi.

definition: The status, methods, character or standards expected of a professional or of a professional organization, such as reliability, discretion, evenhandedness, and fair play.
example: We need to understand the concept of professionalism.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về tính chuyên nghiệp.

definition: A pass entitling the holder to admission to a show, concert, etc.
example: We need to understand the concept of ticket.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về vé.

definition: The act of settling.
example: We need to understand the concept of settlement.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hòa giải.

definition: The settlement of differences by arbitration or by consent reached by mutual concessions.
example: We need to understand the concept of compromise.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thỏa hiệp.

definition: The act or process of arbitrating.
example: We need to understand the concept of arbitration.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trọng tài.

definition: Negotiation to resolve differences conducted by some impartial party.
example: We need to understand the concept of mediation.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hòa giải.

definition: The act of assessing or an amount (of tax, levy or duty etc) assessed.
example: We need to understand the concept of assessment.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đánh giá.

definition: The profession of an advocate
example: We need to understand the concept of advocacy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm vận động.

definition: The manner in which two things may be associated.
example: The relation between diet and health is complex.
exampleVi: Mối quan hệ giữa chế độ ăn uống và sức khỏe rất phức tạp.

definition: Security from damage, loss, or penalty.
example: We need to understand the concept of indemnity.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bồi thường.

definition: An argument or disagreement, a failure to agree.
example: We need to understand the concept of dispute.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tranh chấp.

definition: Something which causes grief.
example: We need to understand the concept of grievance.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm than phiền.

definition: Communication between two parties or groups.
example: We need to understand the concept of liaison.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm liên lạc.

definition: The act of compensating someone for an expense.
example: We need to understand the concept of reimbursement.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hoàn trả.

definition: A deduction from an amount that is paid; an abatement.
example: We need to understand the concept of rebate.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm giảm giá.

definition: An appointed official whose duty is to investigate complaints, generally on behalf of individuals such as consumers or taxpayers, against institutions such as companies and government departments.
example: We need to understand the concept of ombudsman.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thanh tra.
